name: David Grusch
summary: Former U.S. intelligence officer who testified publicly before Congress in July 2023

relationships.context: Testified publicly under oath before the House Oversight Committee
First extended televised interview presenting his allegations publicly
Featured participant in the National Space Symposium panel discussion
Alleged that classified UAP programs were withheld from authorized congressional oversight
Stated that he interviewed more than forty people with claimed firsthand knowledge

profileSummary: Former U.S. intelligence officer whose public testimony and written statement raised allegations concerning hidden UAP programs and congressional oversight.
background: Former U.S. intelligence officer and former representative to the UAP Task Force.
inclusionNote: Included because of public congressional testimony, written testimony, public interviews, and documented whistleblower-related reporting.

referenceSources.label: Official written opening statement
referenceSources.sourceType: House Committee on Oversight and Accountability
